title: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war
summary_full: Seyed Ali Mousavi says Iran has a "right to self-defence" if the UK directly joins US-Israeli attacks.
summary_public: Seyed Ali Mousavi says Iran has a "right to self-defence" if the UK directly joins US-Israeli attacks.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful'
